resourceName: create another distribution with an origin and logging
searchKey: name={{create another distribution with an origin and logging}}.{{community.aws.cloudfront_distribution}}.viewer_certificate.minimum_protocol_version
expectedValue: name={{create another distribution with an origin and logging}}.{{community.aws.cloudfront_distribution}}.viewer_certificate.minimum_protocol_version' should be TLSv1.2_x
actualValue: name={{create another distribution with an origin and logging}}.{{community.aws.cloudfront_distribution}}.viewer_certificate.minimum_protocol_version' is TLSv1.1_2016

resourceName: create a distribution with an origin and logging
